content: BaseTable is a low-level, headless table component built on top of TanStack Table. It provides full control over rendering and behavior through a tanstack table instance. Supports sticky header/footer, row grouping, virtualization, custom row content, resize handles, and sort indicators.

Props for BaseTable:

- table (required): Table<TData> — TanStack Table instance
- attributes: React.TableHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableElement> — HTML attributes for the table element
- bodyAttributes: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement> — HTML attributes for the tbody element
- bodyClassName: string — CSS class for the tbody element
- bodyRef: React.Ref<HTMLTableSectionElement> — Ref for the tbody element
- cellAttributes: React.TdHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement> | ((cell: Cell<TData, unknown>, row: Row<TData>) => React.TdHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement>) — HTML attributes for body cells
- cellClassName: string | ((cell: Cell<TData, unknown>, row: Row<TData>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for body cells
- className: string — CSS class for the table element
- customFooterRowCount: number — Number of custom footer rows
- emptyContent: React.ReactNode — Content rendered when the table has no rows
- footerAttributes: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement> — HTML attributes for the tfoot element
- footerCellAttributes: React.ThHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement> | ((cell: Header<TData, unknown>) => React.ThHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement>) — HTML attributes for footer cells
- footerCellClassName: string | ((cell: Header<TData, unknown>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for footer cells
- footerClassName: string — CSS class for the tfoot element
- footerRowAttributes: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement> | ((headerGroup: HeaderGroup<TData>) => React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement>) — HTML attributes for footer rows
- footerRowClassName: string | ((headerGroup: HeaderGroup<TData>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for footer rows
- getGroupTitle: (row: Row<TData>) => React.ReactNode — Returns the title for a group header row
- getIsCustomRow: (row: Row<TData>) => boolean — Determines if a row is a custom row
- getIsGroupHeaderRow: (row: Row<TData>) => boolean — Determines if a row is a group header row
- groupHeaderClassName: string | ((row: Row<TData>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for group header rows
- headerAttributes: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement> — HTML attributes for the thead element
- headerCellAttributes: React.ThHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement> | ((header: Header<TData, unknown>) => React.ThHTMLAttributes<HTMLTableCellElement>) — HTML attributes for header cells
- headerCellClassName: string | ((header: Header<TData, unknown>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for header cells
- headerClassName: string — CSS class for the thead element
- headerRowAttributes: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement> | ((headerGroup: HeaderGroup<TData>) => React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement>) — HTML attributes for header rows
- headerRowClassName: string | ((headerGroup: HeaderGroup<TData>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for header rows
- onRowClick: (row: Row<TData>, event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLTableRowElement>) => void — Callback when a body row is clicked
- renderCustomFooterContent: (params: {rows: Row<TData>[]}) => React.ReactNode — Renders custom footer content rows
- renderCustomRowContent: (params: {row: Row<TData>}) => React.ReactNode — Renders custom row content
- renderGroupHeader: (params: {row: Row<TData>}) => React.ReactNode — Renders group header row content
- renderGroupHeaderRowContent: (params: {row: Row<TData>}) => React.ReactNode — Renders group header row content (alternative)
- renderHeaderCellContent: (params: {header: Header<TData, unknown>}) => React.ReactNode — Renders header cell content
- renderResizeHandle: (params: {header: Header<TData, unknown>}) => React.ReactNode — Renders column resize handle
- renderSortIndicator: (params: {header: Header<TData, unknown>}) => React.ReactNode — Renders sort indicator in header cells
- resizeHandleClassName: string — CSS class for resize handles
- rowAttributes: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement> | ((row: Row<TData>) => React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement>) — HTML attributes for body rows
- rowClassName: string | ((row: Row<TData>) => string | undefined) — CSS class for body rows
- rowVirtualizer: Virtualizer<TScrollElement, HTMLTableRowElement> — TanStack Virtualizer instance for row virtualization
- sortIndicatorClassName: string — CSS class for sort indicators
- stickyFooter: boolean — default: false — Makes the footer sticky at the bottom of the scroll container
- stickyHeader: boolean — default: false — Makes the header sticky at the top of the scroll container
- withFooter: boolean — default: false — Renders the tfoot element
- withHeader: boolean — default: true — Renders the thead element

code_examples: No data} onRowClick={(row) => console.log(row.original)} />
